top_findings.summary: The skill mandates uploading the generated analysis report to Feishu Cloud Drive, a third-party service, as part of its workflow. While the core purpose is to analyze operational reports and generate summaries for company executives, this upload action is not inherently necessary for the analysis function. It exposes sensitive company data (financial metrics, project progress, risks) to an external server without clear user consent or an option to skip, posing a privacy risk and exceeding the permissions required for local report processing and analysis.
